race.comment: Looks a very competitive affair. MOSHULU SPIRIT (6) has gone bang bang to start the campaign with a dominant Sunny Coast win when resuming and then backing it up with a victory at Doomben last time out. Successful jockey Thompson retains the ride and looks the runner in this line-up with the most upside. Can bring up the hat-trick here. The well-related WHISPERING ROGUE (9) (half to 2xG2 winner and G1 placed Whispering Brook) returned in good order with a close-up second at the Sunshine Coast and will have come on with that run now under the belt. Can go one better. SATISFIED MUGS (5) raced below his best last time when eighth over 1200m at Eagle Farm. Better placed here and is in the mix. PALEFACE RINGO (2) handy gelding who continued his winning ways last start, showing good pace from the outset to salute over 1000m at Gold Coast. Key runner.
